findings.description: The knowledge file uses `<map name="fixedLengthDirectives">` for the fixed-length directive block, but the source file literally contains `<map name="variableLengthDirectives">` for that same block (the source comment says '固定長' but the name attribute is `variableLengthDirectives`). The knowledge file silently corrects what appears to be a typo in the source, but this change has no basis in the source text as written.
findings.source_evidence:
Source: `<!-- ディレクティブ（固定長） -->
<map name="variableLengthDirectives">
  <entry key="record-separator" value="NONE"/>
</map>` — knowledge file renders this as `<map name="fixedLengthDirectives">`
